For all H-2A applicants:
On December 20, 2024, the Department issued guidance concluding that the continued use of the forms associated with the Farmworker Protection Rule is infeasible in the short term, including during the current peak H-2A filing season. As a result, the Department will utilize the forms applicable under the version of 20 CFR part 655, subpart B, in effect on June 27, 2024. These forms are provided below:
- Form ETA-790/790A and Addenda Form ETA-790 Form ETA-790A Form ETA-790A Addendum A Form ETA-790A Addendum B Form ETA-790A, Addendum C Form ETA-790/790A, General Instructions
- Form ETA-790A Addendum A

- Form ETA-790/790A, General Instructions
- Form ETA-9142A and Appendices Form ETA-9142A Form ETA-9142A Appendix A Form ETA-9142A Appendix B Form ETA-9142A General Instructions
- Form ETA-9142A Appendix A
- Form ETA-9142A Appendix B
- Form ETA-9142A General Instructions
The forms pursuant to the Farmworker Protection Rule, which were approved by OMB as explained in OFLC's September 10, 2024, announcement, are not to be used for future applications, but are provided below for reference pending the resolution of ongoing litigation:

Permanent Online Application Application for Permanent Employment Certification Form ETA-9089, Application for Permanent Employment Certification Form ETA-9089, General Instructions Form ETA-9089, Appendix A Form ETA-9089, Appendix B Form ETA-9089, Appendix C Form ETA-9089, Appendix D Form ETA-9089, Final Determination NOTE: Form ETA-9089, Final Determination is for completion and submission ONLY when submitting Form I-140 to USCIS in support of a Schedule A or National Interest Waiver. When submitting the form to USCIS, please sign and submit a fully executed copy of page 2 along with Form ETA-9089 and the appropriate appendices. PERM applications submitted to OFLC will receive an electronic version of this form if the application is certified. USCIS will only accept the signed version of the form sent by OFLC upon certification of the PERM application in support of Form I-140. Submission of any other version of the form other than the version issued electronically by OFLC will be rejected.
- Permanent Online Application Application for Permanent Employment Certification

- Form ETA-9089, General Instructions
- Form ETA-9089, Appendix A
- Form ETA-9089, Appendix B
- Form ETA-9089, Appendix C
- Form ETA-9089, Appendix D
- Form ETA-9089, Final Determination NOTE: Form ETA-9089, Final Determination is for completion and submission ONLY when submitting Form I-140 to USCIS in support of a Schedule A or National Interest Waiver. When submitting the form to USCIS, please sign and submit a fully executed copy of page 2 along with Form ETA-9089 and the appropriate appendices. PERM applications submitted to OFLC will receive an electronic version of this form if the application is certified. USCIS will only accept the signed version of the form sent by OFLC upon certification of the PERM application in support of Form I-140. Submission of any other version of the form other than the version issued electronically by OFLC will be rejected.

You may refer to the instructions above for each form.
